'''sharada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:thanatocoenose|thanatocoenose]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-r-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:thanatocoenose|thanatocoenose]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| sharada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shærædæth|shærædæth]] || [[word:shærædæj|shærædæj]] || [[word:shærædæsh|shærædæsh]] || [[word:shærædæ|shærædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shararadath|shararadath]] || [[word:shararadaj|shararadaj]] || [[word:shararadash|shararadash]] || [[word:shararada|shararada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sharadath|sharadath]] || [[word:sharadaj|sharadaj]] || [[word:sharadash|sharadash]] || [[word:sharada|sharada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sharafdath|sharafdath]] || [[word:sharafdaj|sharafdaj]] || [[word:sharafdash|sharafdash]] || [[word:sharafdaf|sharafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sharadatha|sharadatha]] || [[word:sharadaja|sharadaja]] || [[word:sharadasha|sharadasha]] || [[word:sharadaka|sharadaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sharadath|sharadath]] || [[word:sharadaj|sharadaj]] || [[word:sharadash|sharadash]] || [[word:sharada|sharada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sharadathal|sharadathal]] || [[word:sharadajal|sharadajal]] || [[word:sharadashal|sharadashal]] || [[word:sharadakal|sharadakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sharadathatha|sharadathatha]] || [[word:sharadajaja|sharadajaja]] || [[word:sharadashasha|sharadashasha]] || [[word:sharadaka|sharadaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sharadathan|sharadathan]] || [[word:sharadajan|sharadajan]] || [[word:sharadashan|sharadashan]] || [[word:sharadakan|sharadakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sharadathaoro|sharadathaoro]] || [[word:sharadajaoro|sharadajaoro]] || [[word:sharadashaoro|sharadashaoro]] || [[word:sharadakaoro|sharadakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
